# Terraform AKP Provider Upgrade Guides

Review the relevant guide before upgrading across minor versions. If a minor version is not listed, there are no additional migration steps documented for that version beyond updating the provider version, running `terraform init -upgrade`, and reviewing `terraform plan`.

## Version-Specific Guides

- [Upgrading to v0.13](v0.13-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.12](v0.12-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.11](v0.11-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.10](v0.10-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.9](v0.9-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.8](v0.8-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.7](v0.7-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.6](v0.6-upgrading.md)
- [Upgrading to v0.5](v0.5-upgrading.md)
